title: Lesson 24: Website Structure (How Real Projects Are Organized)

content.explanation:
📁 Thinking Like a Developer

Before writing code in real-world projects, developers always plan how files will be organized.

This is called project structure.

🌐 Why Structure Matters

  • Keeps your website clean and scalable
  • Makes collaboration easier on GitHub
  • Prevents broken file paths

Every professional website follows a predictable folder system.

syntax_breakdown.content:
🧪 Typical Website Folder Structure

my-website/
│
├── index.html
├── about.html
├── contact.html
│
├── images/
│   ├── profile.jpg
│   ├── banner.png
│
├── css/
│   ├── style.css
│
├── js/
│   ├── script.js

📌 Explanation

  • index.html → Home page (entry point)
  • images/ → All images stored here
  • css/ → Styling files
  • js/ → JavaScript logic

🧠 Key Rule

👉 Clean structure = fewer bugs + easier deployment

editor_sandbox.starter_code:
My Website Plan

Learning how real developers organize projects.

mini_challenge.instruction:
🎯 Mission: Design your project structure concept

1. Write a simple HTML page that includes:
   - A main heading (h1) called 'My Website Structure'
   - A paragraph explaining your project idea
   - A list (<ul>) of at least 3 folders you would create (images, css, js)

2. Use proper HTML tags only

🔥 Think like a real developer planning a GitHub project

quiz_engine.question: Why do developers use structured folders in real websites?
options: To organize files and make projects scalable and maintainable
To increase website loading speed automatically
quiz_engine.explanation_feedback: Correct 🎉 Proper structure keeps projects clean, scalable, and prevents broken links or confusion when working on large websites.

takeaways: Real websites use organized folder structures
index.html is the main entry file
Assets like images, CSS, and JS are separated into folders
Good structure prevents broken paths and confusion
Professional developers always plan before coding

cheat_sheet.assets: Images, CSS, JS grouped in folders
